allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('phase:', d.get\('phase','?'\), 'participants:', len\(d.get\('participants',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], p['role']\) for p in d['participants']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], '-', p['role']\) for p in d['participants']]")
